chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3569 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For order on CMA No.19942/2025 (U/A). 2. For order on Misc. No.16943/2025. 3. For order on office objection No.1 & 2. 4. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 19.08.2025 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks post-arrest bail in FIR No.353 of 2025 under Section 93(a), SCNS Act, 2024 registered at Police Station Ibrahim Hyderi. Now the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and proviso for grant of bail is inserted and today learned AAG submits that the Governor, Sindh has assented on 15.08.2025 and only formal Notification is to be issued in the Gazette. Under such circumstances, the petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach the trial Court for bail, this Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
